allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
$cssUrl = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/materialize/1.0.0/css/materialize.min.css'
$jsUrl  = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/materialize/1.0.0/js/materialize.min.js'
$base   = 'C:\\Users\\Max\\Desktop\\csapp\\2324802010287_NgoNguyenDucManh_2324802010238_NguyenQuangHuy\\ASC.Web\\wwwroot'

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\"$base\\css\\" | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\"$base\\js\\"  | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\"$base\\images\\" | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\"$base\\fonts\\roboto\\" | Out-Null

Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $cssUrl -OutFile \\"$base\\css\\materialize.css\\"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $jsUrl  -OutFile \\"$base\\js\\materialize.min.js\\"
Write-Host 'Done'
")
